_publications._publicationTitle: Gene Expression, Network Analysis, and Drug Discovery of Neurofibromatosis Type 2-Associated Vestibular Schwannomas Based on Bioinformatics Analysis.

_contextSnippet: GO functional annotation revealed that the DEGs were significantly enriched in BP terms including cell adhesion, inflammatory response, immune response, signal transduction
details: Performed functional annotation revealing significant enrichment in biological processes including cell adhesion, inflammatory response, immune response, and signal transduction pathways
